title: The Upgrade System
description: Learn to use upgrades to increase your speed, efficiency, and capabilities.

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Some farming challenges have strict time limits. You can't beat them with basic stats - you need upgrades!

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Upgrades improve your stats: movement speed, planting speed, harvesting speed, and max energy!

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Each upgrade costs resources. You'll need to farm wheat and use your earnings to improve your capabilities.

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Open the upgrades panel to see what's available. You'll see: Movement Speed, Planting Speed, Harvesting Speed, and Max Energy.

preDialogues.name: Qubit
preDialogues.content: Each upgrade has levels. Higher levels cost more but give bigger bonuses!

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: Good! You can see the costs and benefits. Let's earn some wheat and buy your first upgrade.

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Farm enough wheat to afford Movement Speed Level 1. Then purchase it and feel the difference!

preDialogues.name: Qubit
preDialogues.content: Movement speed makes you move faster between farmlands. This saves time and energy!

objectives.description: Farm wheat to afford the upgrade

postDialogues.name: Qubit
postDialogues.content: Whoa! You're moving faster now! See how upgrades change the game?

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: Exactly! Now you can complete tasks that were impossible before. Upgrades are essential for advanced challenges.

phases.title: Time-Based Challenge
phases.description: Use upgrades to beat the clock

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Here's the real test: plant and harvest 5 wheat plots in under 60 seconds. Without upgrades, this is nearly impossible!

preDialogues.name: Qubit
preDialogues.content: You'll need to upgrade planting speed and movement speed. Farm more wheat, buy upgrades, then take on the challenge!

objectives.description: Plant and harvest 5 wheat in under 60 seconds

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: Incredible! You beat the timer! This is the power of combining code with upgrades.

postDialogues.name: Qubit
postDialogues.content: Now you understand the foundations of Binary Coven - functions, energy, scanning, and upgrades!
